semantic.role: Unit test suite for the FixTask syntax validation functionality.
responsibilities: Verifies that FixTask.validateSyntax correctly accepts syntactically valid TypeScript.
Verifies that FixTask.validateSyntax correctly rejects syntactically invalid TypeScript.
outOfScope: Testing the behavior of the fix engine beyond syntax validation.
invariants: Test file suffix must be .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This file belongs to the unit test layer, providing isolated validation of the FixTask syntax guardrail.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected; the test covers valid/invalid TypeScript detection.
